case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CORP VS SANTAMARIA CESAR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA CESAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $534.93 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CORP AS TO DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
